event.description: Standard coordinator events: heartbeat (liveness), recovered (post-fault restart), handover (planned transfer), assumed (unplanned takeover), authorization (pre-commit operation approval).

successor_coordinator_id.description: Required when event=handover: principal ID of the successor coordinator.

next_coordinator_epoch.description: Required when event=handover: epoch the successor coordinator will assume.

authorized_op_id.description: Required when event=authorization: operation ID being authorized.

authorized_batch_id.description: Present when event=authorization and the operation belongs to a batch.

authorized_by.description: Required when event=authorization: principal ID of the authorizing coordinator.
